name: Antipasto Di Mare
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Sweet red onion, thinly sliced, or 1 green or red bell pepper, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the tuna while it is still in the can and place it in the center of a large plate.
2. Drizzle olive oil over the tuna and season with black pepper.
3. Sprinkle capers evenly over the tuna.
4. Scatter olives over the dish.
5. Arrange the desired salad vegetables on the plate (tomato wedges, radishes, celery, onion, or bell pepper) and season with salt and pepper.
6. Drizzle fresh lemon juice over all the ingredients.
7. Serve with crusty bread or crackers.
Makes two servings.
